_publications._publicationTitle: Activity of Selumetinib in Neurofibromatosis Type 1-Related Plexiform Neurofibromas.

_contextSnippet: Selumetinib was associated with decreases from baseline in neurofibroma volume in 12 of 18 mice (67%) in the animal model of neurofibromatosis type 1– related neurofibroma
details: Selumetinib was associated with decreases from baseline in neurofibroma volume in 12 of 18 mice (67%)
